zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，短线回调整理
zh.content:
当前ADAUSD整体呈震荡偏强结构，价格运行在0.197附近，短线从0.199回落但仍未跌破均线支撑，市场进入整理阶段为主

MACD仍处正值区间，动能指标显示多头略占优势，但柱体收敛提示上涨动能减弱，RSI缺失需结合结构判断，SMA20支撑0.181

下方支撑0.197附近，上方阻力0.1998，突破则延续反弹，否则维持震荡运行。

操作上建议短线区间思路，未突破0.1998不追高，回踩0.197附近分批轻仓试多，设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
0.197147 ADA/USD shows mild intraday pullback -1.18% after testing 0.1998 high. structure still mildly bullish above SMA20 0.1813. price compressing under psychological 0.20 resistance, suggesting short-term consolidation rather than reversal. overall trend from SMA indicates recovery phase, but momentum is stalling as buyers fail to extend highs. Market remains range-bound on lower timeframe with reduced volatility and limited directional conviction. Short-term outlook remains neutral-bullish.

MACD 0.0057 positive suggests bullish momentum remains, but absence of signal line prevents crossover confirmation, implying weakening trend strength. lack of RSI limits overbought/oversold clarity, though price proximity to session low indicates short-term bearish pressure. volume context unknown, but price behavior suggests momentum cooling rather than distribution. This suggests traders should wait for confirmation before assuming continuation or breakdown bias remains neutral in the short term.

Immediate support at 0.195 region (recent low), stronger at SMA20 0.1813 aligning with dynamic trend floor. resistance sits at 0.20 psychological barrier, followed by 0.205 and 0.210 as next supply zones where prior sellers likely re-enter. breakout above 0.20 would confirm continuation of recovery structure. Holding above SMA20 is key for maintaining bullish structure and preventing deeper retracement toward 0.18 zone.

Cautious bias; traders may consider range strategy buying near 0.19-0.195 with tight stops below 0.181 SMA20. breakout traders should wait for confirmed close above 0.20 with MACD expansion. downside break of 0.195 risks retest of 0.181 support. risk management critical due to low volatility compression phase. Patience is required as market awaits decisive move beyond key psychological level confirmation.
